textPlain: Great to see they support and still use Perl. Geizhals is a very usable and functional product and price comparison page. Looks a little bit old, but that is exactly what I like. Geizhals is associated with the Heise Verlag, that is what I do not like so much, because there was a steady decline in quality in the recent years.
did not know (or forgot) that they were using PerlGeizhals is a huge price comparison app in the german speaking market.
